title: Boat with Sudanese migrants capsizes off Libya
summary: A boat carrying 33 Sudanese migrants capsized in the Mediterranean Sea near Tobruk, leaving at least 17 dead and nine missing.
contents:
## Boat with Sudanese migrants capsizes off Libya

### Overview
A boat carrying 33 Sudanese migrants capsized in the Mediterranean Sea near Tobruk, leaving at least 17 dead and nine missing.

### Details
The vessel departed from Tobruk heading toward Greece and capsized approximately 100 kilometers northwest of the city. Only seven survivors operated as rescued after remaining stranded at sea for several days, with some migrants dying from hunger and thirst. Rescue operations involved the Libyan navy, coast guard, and Red Crescent.

### Geographic context
Location: Tobruk, Libya.
